framework: Schelling focal point detection + physical observables
design: 两层观测: 物理层(状态)+ 焦点层(转折). History in geopulse.db

history.note: Action-only: CENTCOM/major wires still report recurring strikes and exchanges; no verified zero-attack window, so IRGC attack tempo remains low-but-persistent.
Action-only: CENTCOM and major-wire war updates still indicate recurring strike activity with no verified zero-attack window; maintain low-but-persistent baseline.
Action-only: CENTCOM and major outlets still report recurring strike activity (e.g., week-5 strike footage, continued exchanges); no verified zero-attack window.
Action-filtered: CENTCOM continues daily strike releases (latest ~14h), Reuters reports near-daily escort requests amid recurring ship attacks/harassment; tempo remains sustained rather than spiking.
Action-filtered: CENTCOM continues publishing daily strike activity; Reuters/major outlets show sustained but not accelerating Iran-linked attack tempo.

Action-only: CENTCOM continues daily strike reporting; Reuters/major wires still describe recurring Iran-linked harassment/attack risk (near-daily escort requests), with no verified zero-attack window.
Action-only: ISW Apr 1 and Apr 5 continue to log Iranian attacks on shipping and Gulf-linked targets, with no verified zero-attack window; keep low-but-persistent IRGC tempo.
Action-only: ISW Apr 5 and continuing CENTCOM strike activity show no verified zero-attack window; maintain low persistent IRGC tempo.

Action-only: ISW Apr 5 still treats Iranian attacks on shipping as ongoing, UKMTO/CBS reported two ships struck near Basra on Apr 3-4, and CENTCOM strike activity continues; no verified zero-attack window.
Action-only: CENTCOM daily strike releases; ISW/UKMTO still report recurring Iran-linked attacks; no verified zero-attack window.
Action-only: CENTCOM daily strike releases; ISW/major wires report recurring Iran-linked attacks; no verified zero-attack window
Action-only: No verified zero-attack window in CENTCOM/ISW reporting; IRGC baseline persists
4/8停火生效, CENTCOM暂停打击; 但停火紧张—伊朗指控美/以黎巴嫩行动违约; 4/6 B-2轰炸IRGC地下总部(行动); 4/7 IRGC情报总长Khademi被击毙; 'hundreds'无人机仍在Op Epic Fury部署中
停火D4(4/8起); CENTCOM暂停打击; 但停火脆弱—伊朗指控美/以黎巴嫩行动违约; War Powers 60天时限~4/28; 'hundreds'无人机仍部署; 无验证的零攻击窗口进入第4天
Action-only: Reuters/BBC shipping coverage still shows selective Hormuz transits at trickle pace with no full normalization; US military escort mission still not launched.
Action-only: BBC Verify/Guardian-style shipping coverage still indicates Hormuz trickle transit with selective passage/routing and no broad normalization.
Action-only: BBC Verify indicates just under 100 transits since early March and Reuters/USNI-style reporting still points to trickle traffic with selective passage, far below pre-crisis.
Action-filtered shipping data: BBC Verify 'just under 100 transits since start of March' and Argus '20 crossings since Mar 28' imply low single-digit daily flow, still far below pre-war ~130+/day.
Action-filtered shipping prints show partial reopening: Seatrade/Fars reported 15 ships in last 24h (Apr 5), above prior low-single-digit baseline but still far below pre-war ~130+/day.
Action-only: Seatrade/Fars + Windward reporting showed ~15 ships allowed and ~20 total Hormuz transits in last 24h (Apr 5), above prior trickle but far below pre-crisis ~100+ per day.
Action-only: Seatrade/Windward reporting cited 15 ships cleared and about 20 total Hormuz transits in the prior 24h as of Apr 5; still far below pre-crisis flow.
Action-only: Seatrade Apr 6 citing Fars and Windward said 15 ships were cleared and about 20 total Hormuz transits occurred in the prior 24 hours; still far below pre-crisis flow.
Action-only: Seatrade Apr 6 citing Fars said 15 ships were cleared in the prior 24h, while Windward counted about 20 total Hormuz transits; still far below pre-crisis flow.
Action-only: Seatrade/Windward ~20 transits prior 24h; partial reopening but still far below pre-crisis ~100+/day.
Action-only: Seatrade/Windward ~20 transits prior 24h; partial reopening but still far below pre-crisis ~100+/day
Apr 9: WTI report - only ONE oil products tanker transited Hormuz in first 24h of ceasefire; Strait effectively closed; Tehran requires military approval for passage
Al Jazeera 4/10: 停火后海峡仍近停滞; 伊朗未兑现开放承诺; 600+船只(含325油轮)滞港; 若停火维持预计最多10-15艘/天; 停火前战时累计仅21艘通过(vs平时100+/天)
NBC/CBS: 停火后海峡'effectively standstill'; 停火首2天仅~10艘通过; 4/9仅5艘,4/10约7艘; 600+船滞港(含325油轮); 伊朗收M+过境费+军方审批; 远低于战前129艘/天; 比停火前~20艘/天反而下降

q3_spr_release_rate.label: SPR实际释放速率(mbd)
q3_spr_release_rate.delivery_timeline: 120 days per DOE, first barrels end of W3

history.note: Action-only: DOE emergency exchange flow remains active (including Bryan Mound tranche) with no clear evidence of a fresh release-rate acceleration in latest weekly references.
Action-only: DOE emergency exchange plus weekly EIA SPR references indicate continued release flow without a confirmed fresh acceleration in rate.
Action-only: DOE emergency SPR exchange flow remains active (Bryan Mound tranche); no clear evidence in latest weekly references of a fresh rate acceleration.
DOE statement: 172M bbl SPR release over ~120 days => ~1.43 mbd draw (~10M bbl/week); implementation ongoing via coordinated IEA release.
DOE/Reuters line unchanged: 172M bbl SPR release over ~120 days implies ~1.43 mbd (~10M bbl/week) discharge pace.
EIA weekly SPR stocks (WCSSTUS1) fell from 415,442 kb (2026-03-20) to 415,064 kb (2026-03-27): -378 kb w/w, implying low realized net draw pace in latest report.
Official EIA weekly SPR stocks page released Apr 1 shows 415.064m bbl for week ending Mar 27, down 378 kb w/w from 415.442m; no new Apr 8 report yet.
Official EIA Table 1 for week ending Mar 27 shows SPR stocks at 415.064m bbl, down 0.378m w/w from 415.442m; no newer Apr 8 report yet.
Official EIA weekly SPR stocks page: 415.064m bbl for week ending Mar 27 versus 415.442m prior week, a 378 kb draw; no newer weekly report is out before Apr 8.
Official EIA weekly: 415.064m bbl week ending Mar 27, down 378kb w/w; no newer report yet.

history.est: ~1.4 mbd (DOE release rate) / ~0.05 mbd (EIA net draw)
history.note: DOE: 172M bbl / 120 days = ~1.4 mbd; EIA weekly: 415.064m bbl week ending Mar 27 (-378kb w/w) = ~0.05 mbd net draw; discrepancy due to exchange vs drawdown structure
DOE: 172M/120d = ~1.4 mbd; EIA weekly (Mar 27): 415.064m bbl (-378kb w/w) = ~0.05 mbd net; exchange vs drawdown structure explains discrepancy
DOE: 172M bbl/120天=~1.43 mbd; 45M bbl首批合同已签+交付启动; EIA周报(3/27): 415.064M bbl净库存(-378kb w/w); 交换结构(不是直接抽储)解释净提取偏低; IEA协调G7 400M+ bbl
EIA 4/8报告(截至4/3): SPR库存~413.3M bbl, 周降1.739M bbl=~0.25 mbd净提取; 较前周0.05 mbd显著加速; DOE目标1.4 mbd(172M/120天); 45M首批已签约交付; 交换结构vs直接抽储仍解释净值偏低

fp1_china_action.label: 中国实质行动(唯一可行聚点注入)
fp1_china_action.findings: 巴基斯坦大使确认中国在停火外交中扮演'quiet but constructive role'(行动); 王毅26通电话(行动); 中方中东特使赴海湾斡旋(行动); 中巴5点倡议; 但无军事/海军部署; 美方仍'disinterested'; 停火后中国继续外交推动但无新实质升级

fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.label: 美方信号包内部矛盾(承诺解锁前导)
fp2_us_signal_inconsistency.findings: 停火签署(行动)+万斯赴伊斯兰堡谈判4/10(行动); 但: 海峡仍effectively closed(停火条件未兑现); 护航任务仍未启动; 伊朗10点计划极端(制裁全免+驻军撤出+战损赔偿+UNSC决议); 万斯称计划'已改变'被伊方否认; Trump威胁停火失败将'renew and intensify'打击; 核心矛盾: 停火≠和平,海峡≠开放

fp3_face_saving_framework.label: 面子工程原材料出现
fp3_face_saving_framework.findings: 伊斯兰堡面对面谈判4/10启动(行动); 万斯率代表团(行动); 伊朗10点计划=退出框架原材料; 巴基斯坦调解成功将双方拉到谈判桌; 但差距巨大: 伊朗要求制裁全免+美军撤出+战损赔偿+UNSC约束性决议; 伊朗拒绝巴方45天两阶段方案; 两周停火窗口4/22到期

fp4_cost_threshold.label: 成本阈值的物理逼近
fp4_cost_threshold.findings: 汽油.87/加仑(AAA 4/6); 13名美军阵亡; 战费~B; 美国家庭额外汽油支出.1B(/户); GOP面临战费拨款内斗(两院多数极薄); War Powers 60天时限~4/28逼近; Bloomberg警告中期选举; 停火减缓成本积聚但未消除; 国会民主党将继续推动战争权力投票

noise_filter.rule: 按行为类型分类,不按人物分类
noise: 巴盖伊等发言人声明(言辞)
媒体'消息人士'报道(未验证)
signal: Trump签署行政令/军事命令(行动)
美军实际调兵/部署变化(行动)
IRGC实际攻击模式变化(行动)
中国实际经济/军事动作(行动)
noise_filter.key_distinction: 同一个人的言辞=噪声,行动=信号。Trump说'just for fun'=噪声。Trump命令打Kharg=信号。

pipeline_daily_checklist: 1. 物理层: 更新Q1(袭击频率) + Q2(通行量) + Q3(SPR释放)
2. 焦点层: 扫描fp1(中国动作) + fp2(美方矛盾) + fp3(退出框架) + fp4(成本阈值)
3. 噪声过滤: 新闻分类为action vs rhetoric
4. 结构性验证: 跑structural_verify检查盲区+停滞+链断裂
5. DAG更新: 只有物理层变化或焦点层信号触发才更新概率
